allow: PowerShell(Write-Output "=== UTEid project folder ==="; Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\Users\\dhuy8\\OneDrive\\Documents\\WP\\Class_Project_WP\\UTEid\\UTEid" | Where-Object { $_.Name -match '\\.\(sql|mdf|ldf\)$' } | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "$\($_.Name\) \($\($_.Length\) bytes\)" }; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "=== config folder ==="; if \(Test-Path "C:\\Users\\dhuy8\\OneDrive\\Documents\\WP\\Class_Project_WP\\UTEid\\config"\) { Write-Output "config folder still exists" } else { Write-Output "config folder removed - clean" })

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== Database files in UTEid project folder ==="; Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\Users\\dhuy8\\OneDrive\\Documents\\WP\\Class_Project_WP\\UTEid\\UTEid" | Where-Object { $_.Name -match '\\.\(sql|mdf|ldf\)$' } | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "  $\($_.Name\) \($\([math]::Round\($_.Length/1KB,1\)\) KB\)" }; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "=== config folder ==="; if \(Test-Path "C:\\Users\\dhuy8\\OneDrive\\Documents\\WP\\Class_Project_WP\\UTEid\\config"\) { Write-Output "  Still exists" } else { Write-Output "  Removed - clean" })
